mapper.sql: id, route_id, route_code, line_code AS section_code, line_name AS section_name, direction, start_stake, end_stake, length_km, pavement_type, technical_grade, lane_count, road_width, traffic_volume_level, adcode, manage_org_id, project_id, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom) AS geom_geo_json, remark, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM road_section_line WHERE ORDER BY route_code ASC, start_stake ASC
SELECT FROM road_section_line WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
SELECT FROM road_section_line WHERE AND geom IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_code ASC, start_stake ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO road_section_line(id, tenant_id, route_id, route_code, line_code, line_name, direction, start_stake, end_stake, length_km, pavement_type, technical_grade, lane_count, road_width, traffic_volume_level, adcode, manage_org_id, project_id, geom, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{routeId}, #{routeCode}, #{sectionCode}, #{sectionName}, #{direction}, #{startStake}, #{endStake}, #{lengthKm}, #{pavementType}, #{technicalGrade}, #{laneCount}, #{roadWidth}, #{trafficVolumeLevel}, #{adcode}, #{manageOrgId}, #{projectId}, ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326)NULL, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: UPDATE road_section_line SET route_id=#{routeId}, route_code=#{routeCode}, line_code=#{sectionCode}, line_name=#{sectionName}, direction=#{direction}, start_stake=#{startStake}, end_stake=#{endStake}, length_km=#{lengthKm}, pavement_type=#{pavementType}, technical_grade=#{technicalGrade}, lane_count=#{laneCount}, road_width=#{roadWidth}, traffic_volume_level=#{trafficVolumeLevel}, adcode=#{adcode}, manage_org_id=#{manageOrgId}, project_id=#{projectId}, remark=#{remark}, updated_by=#{updatedBy}, updated_at=now() , geom=ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326) WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM road_section_line WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND line_code=#{sectionCode} AND deleted=false LIMIT 1
SELECT line_code AS lineCode, id FROM road_section_line WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND deleted=false AND line_code IN #{c}

SELECT id, route_code AS routeCode, direction, start_stake AS startStake, end_stake AS endStake FROM road_section_line WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND deleted=false AND (route_code, direction, start_stake, end_stake) IN
(#{r.routeCode},#{r.direction},#{r.startStake},#{r.endStake})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO road_section_line(id, tenant_id, route_id, route_code, line_code, line_name, direction, start_stake, end_stake, length_km, pavement_type, technical_grade, lane_count, road_width, traffic_volume_level, adcode, manage_org_id, project_id, geom, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES
(#{e.id}, #{tenantId}, #{e.routeId}, #{e.routeCode}, #{e.sectionCode}, #{e.sectionName}, #{e.direction}, #{e.startStake}, #{e.endStake}, #{e.lengthKm}, #{e.pavementType}, #{e.technicalGrade}, #{e.laneCount}, #{e.roadWidth}, #{e.trafficVolumeLevel}, #{e.adcode}, #{e.manageOrgId}, #{e.projectId}, ST_GeomFromText(#{e.geomWkt}, 4326)NULL, #{e.remark}, #{userId}, #{userId}, now(), now(), false)
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, line_code) DO UPDATE SET route_id = EXCLUDED.route_id, route_code = EXCLUDED.route_code, line_name = EXCLUDED.line_name, direction = EXCLUDED.direction, start_stake = EXCLUDED.start_stake, end_stake = EXCLUDED.end_stake, length_km = EXCLUDED.length_km, pavement_type = EXCLUDED.pavement_type, technical_grade = EXCLUDED.technical_grade, lane_count = EXCLUDED.lane_count, road_width = EXCLUDED.road_width, traffic_volume_level = EXCLUDED.traffic_volume_level, adcode = EXCLUDED.adcode, manage_org_id = EXCLUDED.manage_org_id, project_id = EXCLUDED.project_id, geom = EXCLUDED.geom, remark = EXCLUDED.remark, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_at = now(), deleted = false
